rationale: Adds mobile-responsive support to the BOM selector workspace. components/workspace/Workspace.tsx splits its layout into a desktop branch (`<div className='hidden min-h-0 flex-1 md:flex'>`) with the original 3-pane horizontal arrangement (CandidateListPane | CandidateDashboardPane | CandidateDetailPane) and a mobile branch (`<div className='flex min-h-0 flex-1 flex-col md:hidden'>`) wrapped in a new shadcn-style Tabs component (catalog / detail / bom). The new components/ui/tabs.tsx wraps base-ui's TabsPrimitive. Pane components gain optional `className?` props (twMerge-applied via cn()), CandidateDetailPane also gains `showToggle?` (defaults true) and `dndContextId?` (defaults 'bom-dnd-context') so the mobile instance can use 'bom-dnd-context-mobile' to avoid id collisions. CandidateDetailPane adds TouchSensor alongside PointerSensor/KeyboardSensor for touch DnD. GlobalHeader.tsx now consumes useSidebar().toggleSidebar and renders a `md:hidden` PanelLeft button so mobile users can open the project Sidebar Sheet. ProjectFormDialog.tsx refactors away from `useState + useEffect` to reset form values: the form fields move into a `<FormFields>` child component that's remounted via a `key` derived from initial values, matching the project's stated 'no Effect-as-state-copy' rule. Clean responsive-design implementation matching the body.
